title: Better Mobs
description: This modpack makes mobs harder to beat
body:
Ever thought Minecraft mobs were to easy to kill?  Well this modpack makes them harder to beat!  It makes them randomly spawn with armor, potion effects or special abilities, and more baby variants!  It also has Villager Guards, to guard your villages, Creeper Overhaul to make creepers more creepy.

Enjoy!
